meaning: n.有翼的马,神马,飞马,诗兴
examples: Flying high in the autumn sky is the mythical winged horse Pegasus.
This is the default CIM namespace that comes with your Pegasus installation.
The best restaurant, Pegasus, has only one table occupied: your correspondent's.
Of course it could be that Pegasus is just a poor investment, as some have asserted.
Pegasus has carrying Canadian crude, but it was conventional crude, not the type assailed by opponents.
